description: Build interactive TUI for worktree navigation: Create pkg/tui package using bubbletea and lipgloss. Implement list view showing projects with their worktrees. Support keyboard navigation (↑/↓ arrows, Enter to select, 'o' to open in VS Code, 'c' to create worktree, 'd' to delete, 'q' to quit). Display worktree info: path, branch, git status indicators (*, ↑, ↓). Use lipgloss for styling (colors, borders). Model should track: selectedIndex, projects, worktrees.
acceptance_criteria: pkg/tui/model.go exists with bubbletea Model implementation
View displays projects and worktrees with status indicators

verification.value: Run 'wt' and verify interactive navigation works
